description_long: This is a single-story suburban house situated on a rectangular green lawn. The house features a moderately pitched gable roof with a main section and a smaller perpendicular extension, both covered in a light-colored material. The front facade includes a covered porch with steps leading up to the main entryway, flanked by windows on either side. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the windows are symmetrically arranged, providing a balanced appearance. The rear and side elevations show additional windows and a secondary entrance, with the overall structure being compact and horizontally oriented. The house is typical of a ranch or craftsman-inspired suburban home, designed for residential use in a neighborhood setting.
description: A single-story suburban house with a gable roof, covered porch, and symmetrically arranged windows, set on a green lawn. The exterior is light-colored and the structure is compact and horizontally oriented.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entryway, and symmetrical windows on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated profile, gable roof, and additional windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a secondary entrance and more windows, with the roof extension visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, windows, and the continuation of the gable roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, central door, and flanking windows
